content: I was going through issues on GitHub, and I saw some of the issues have MSRV requirements. Would it be useful to somehow tag such issues somehow so that one could filter issues more easily when the MSRV is increased in the future?
Sure, we could add a tag for that. If the issues mention MSRV, search may be an option too -- we don't do many MSRV increases (e.g. we may end up with one increase every 2 years).
